usage_hints: jq '.triage.quick_ref.top_picks[:3]' - Top 3 picks for immediate work
jq '.triage.recommendations[3:10] | map({id,title,score})' - Next candidates after top picks
jq '.triage.blockers_to_clear | map(.id)' - High-impact blockers to clear
--robot-next - Get only the single top recommendation
--robot-triage-by-track - Group by execution track for multi-agent coordination
--robot-triage-by-label - Group by label for area-focused agents
jq '.plan.tracks | length' - Number of parallel execution tracks
jq '.plan.tracks[0].items | map(.id)' - First track item IDs
jq '.plan.tracks[].items[] | select(.unblocks | length > 0)' - Items that unblock others
jq '[.plan.tracks[].items[]] | length' - Total items across all tracks

coverage_set.how_to_use: Small vertex cover touching all dependency edges. Use for breadth coverage.
coverage_set.rationale: Greedy vertex cover (2-approx): iteratively pick highest uncovered degree until edges are covered or cap is reached.

cycle_break.advisory: Structural fix—apply cycle breaks BEFORE executing dependents.
cycle_break.how_to_use: Structural fix suggestions. Apply BEFORE working on cycle members.

suggestions.rationale: Appears in most cycles; removing minimizes structural damage.
Appears in most cycles; removing minimizes structural damage.
Appears in most cycles; removing minimizes structural damage.
Appears in most cycles; removing minimizes structural damage.

k_paths.how_to_use: K-shortest critical paths. Focus on issues appearing in multiple paths.

parallel_cut.how_to_use: Issues that enable parallel work. Complete to maximize team throughput.

parallel_gain.how_to_use: Parallelization improvement from completing each issue.

topk_set.how_to_use: Best k issues to complete for max downstream unlock. Work these in order.

field_descriptions.status.capped: Whether results were truncated to prevent overload
field_descriptions.status.phase2: Whether expensive graph metrics (PageRank, betweenness) are included
field_descriptions.top_reasons: Top 3 factors contributing to priority score, ordered by weight
field_descriptions.what_if.days_saved: Estimated days saved based on issue estimates
field_descriptions.what_if.depth: Critical path depth reduction if completed
field_descriptions.what_if.parallelization_gain: Net change in parallel work capacity (direct_unblocks - 1); positive = more parallel work possible
field_descriptions.what_if.unblocks: Number of issues directly waiting on this one
